name: Coverage overlap analysis — employer + personal + spouse family floater
description: User has employer health insurance, personal health insurance, and wife's family floater — wants to understand overlap and optimise portfolio

input.message: I have employer health insurance ₹3L, personal health ₹5L, and my wife has ₹10L family floater. Is there overlap? What should I do?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response perform a meaningful overlap and gap analysis for this portfolio?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) multi-policy coordination rules (employer = primary for employee, personal = secondary), (2) whether wife's family floater covers the user (as family member), (3) effective total cover for each family member, (4) gaps (elder parents if not covered)?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the principle of contribution clause and coordination between multiple health policies accurately explained?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No invented policy terms for unnamed policies? Does it note that contribution clause prevents double claiming of the same expense? Disclaimer present?
